purpose: Conformance contract for the wcstok overread fix originally landed under bd-0cjqo (closed 2026-04-29). The audit pass 2026-05-10T03-16-16Z scored bd-0cjqo at 470/1000 (false-closed) with a single missing item: tests.conformance.primary. This manifest + harness gate satisfies that requirement by pinning, at conformance level, that frankenlibc-abi's wcstok bounds delimiter scans by allocator-tracked extents (malloc_abi::known_remaining) and rejects tracked-unterminated delimiters BEFORE constructing the delim slice that would otherwise cause an out-of-bounds read.

required_guards.description: wcstok must compute `let delim_bound = known_remaining(delim as usize).map(bytes_to_wchars);` so scan_w_string respects the allocator's tracked extent for the delim allocation.
wcstok must invoke `scan_w_string(delim, delim_bound)` so the scan returns (delim_len, terminated) safely.
wcstok must check `if !delim_terminated { return null }` BEFORE the `slice::from_raw_parts(delim, delim_len)` call. The reject branch returns std::ptr::null_mut().
